text:
Once upon a time in the forest where squirrels lived, there was a curious little squirrel named Olive. Olive loved exploring the vast woods. One day, she stumbled upon a peculiar object buried deep under leaves—a locket. Fascinated, Olive popped it open. Inside lay a tiny photograph?Olive wasn't sure.

Carefully cleaning the image, she discovered a favorite childhood storybook about brave explorers. That night, Olive dreamed she was the hero who finally recovered the book.

Come morning, Olive crafted a tiny backpack identical to hers. Packing her favorite things—her cloak, her tiny sword replica, and a copy of her favorite book—she snuck out.

At dawn, Olive ventured deep into the forest. Following the pictures, she traced a small river. Along the bank, she discovered an old wooden chest. Opening it revealed not treasure?

Instead?A friendship note. Olive smiled; she loved friends. She carried it back home.

That evening, Olive read aloud her friend
